title: selaginella ascillifolia
intro: Selaginella ascillifolia, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella ascillifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Selaginella ascillifolia can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
